slamfitness.name: Slam Fitness
slamfitness.tagline: Every rep. Every show-up. Every breakthrough.

activities.name: Morning Iron
activities.description: Attend any session in the 6am–9am slot — the Slam Fitness heartbeat.

activities.name: Off-Peak Pioneer
activities.description: Attend a session between 10am–4pm on a weekday to help build the daytime community.

activities.name: Streak Keeper
activities.description: Attend at least 3 sessions in a calendar week — awarded automatically on Sunday night.

activities.name: Personal Best
activities.description: Log a verified new personal best in lift, time, or output — confirmed by your coach.

activities.name: Come Back Stronger
activities.description: Book and attend a session after a 7 or more day absence from the gym.

activities.name: Coach Check-In
activities.description: Complete a coach-led progress review covering goal updates, form feedback, or programme adjustments.

activities.name: Boot Camp Crew
activities.description: Attend a group boot camp or conditioning class for a social session, not just a workout.

activities.name: Challenge Completed
activities.description: Finish a monthly Slam Fitness challenge in full — high effort, high reward.

activities.name: Bring a Lifer
activities.description: Refer a friend who completes a full trial session at Slam Fitness — awarded on trial completion.

activities.name: Journey Share
activities.description: Tag @SlamFitnessDublin in a post or story documenting your training — once per week maximum.

activities.name: 100-Session Marker
activities.description: Attend your 100th lifetime session at Slam Fitness — rare, significant, and celebrated.

activities.name: Programme Milestone
activities.description: Complete a full 4-week training block as prescribed by your coach without deviation.

activities.name: New Member Welcome
activities.description: Complete your first week at Slam Fitness with 3 or more sessions as an onboarding accelerator.

rewards.name: Guest Pass
rewards.description: One complimentary trial session for a friend — perfectly aligned with the Bring a Lifer referral mechanic.

rewards.name: Priority Class Booking
rewards.description: Get 48-hour early access to book the following week's classes before they open to general release.

rewards.name: Slam Kit Credit
rewards.description: Receive €15 credit toward Slam Fitness branded merchandise at the studio.

rewards.name: Recovery Session
rewards.description: One free mobility, recovery, or guided stretch session to support performance and longevity.

rewards.name: Nutrition Workshop Access
rewards.description: Free entry to a Slam Fitness nutrition or performance workshop — invest in the knowledge behind the work.

rewards.name: Coach Session Upgrade
rewards.description: One free 30-minute one-to-one coaching or programme review session with your assigned coach.

rewards.name: Hall of Iron Entry
rewards.description: Earn permanent entry in the in-gym and in-app Slam Fitness Hall of Iron leaderboard — the prestige reward.

rewards.name: Slam Month
rewards.description: Receive €20 off your next month's membership — reserved for the most committed, high-engagement members.
